overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with pink hair walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The camera follows the character through covered walkways, under overpasses with blue neon strips, and across intersections lined with holographic advertisements and towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang

events.description: enters covered walkway from open street, moving from neon-lit exterior to green-lit interior space

agents.ego_description: character with pink hair walking steadily through the covered walkway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction under the covered walkway

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying purple and orange cyberpunk artwork
concrete ceiling with recessed lighting creating a tunnel-like covered passage
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures emitting greenish light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character entering a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a building overhang. The environment shifts from the open neon-lit street to a more enclosed space with green fluorescent lighting and concrete pillars. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction as the camera follows the character's steady forward movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk with digital billboards and overpass

events.description: exits covered walkway back into open air, revealing city skyline and palm trees
passes under overpass with prominent blue neon light strip illuminating the scene

agents.ego_description: character walking along the wet sidewalk, passing large digital advertisements and moving under an overpass structure

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past on the wet street, reflecting neon lights

entered.detail: tall vertical screen displaying animated cyberpunk advertisements with purple and orange frames
elevated highway or walkway with distinctive cyan blue neon strip lighting underneath
tall palm tree silhouetted against the night sky and city lights

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into the open night air, revealing a stunning cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers and palm trees. The camera follows along a wet sidewalk lined with massive digital billboards before passing under an overpass illuminated by a striking blue neon light strip. Sparse traffic moves along the rain-slicked street as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground overpass with concrete pillars and neon lighting

events.description: exits the covered overpass area, revealing the open intersection and hotel building ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily under the overpass, approaching the exit where the hotel sign becomes visible in the distance

entered.detail: textured concrete wall with green graffiti markings and weathered surface
large illuminated hotel sign with blue neon Japanese characters reading HOテル

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking under the expansive overpass structure, surrounded by concrete pillars and illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights and the blue neon strip. The environment feels enclosed and urban. As the character approaches the end of the underpass, the hotel sign with Japanese characters becomes visible in the distance, signaling the approach to a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with hotel and crosswalks

events.description: approaches crosswalk and waits for traffic signal while vehicles pass
begins crossing the street at the crosswalk, moving from sidewalk to road surface

agents.ego_description: character approaches the intersection, waits at the crosswalk, then crosses the street while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall building with prominent blue neon hotel signage and red staircase structure
pedestrian traffic signal showing red hand indicating stop
zebra crossing with bold yellow and white stripes on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a bustling intersection dominated by the HOテル building with its distinctive blue neon signage. The scene opens up to reveal multiple crosswalks, traffic lights, and moderate pedestrian activity. The character waits at the red pedestrian signal before crossing the rain-slicked street, navigating through other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet roads reflecting the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with convenience store and neon signs

events.description: passes the 24/7 convenience store entrance with bright interior lighting spilling onto sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character walking past the hotel and convenience store, continuing along the neon-lit sidewalk

notable_agents.action: street vendor with illuminated cart standing near the curb

entered.detail: bright blue storefront with '24/7 STORE' neon signage and open glass doors
futuristic curved building facade with red neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts. The bright blue neon of the 24/7 convenience store dominates the left side, its interior light spilling onto the wet pavement. The hotel building recedes into the background as the character passes by a street vendor and continues through the rain-soaked streets, surrounded by the glow of holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic city, transitioning from enclosed pedestrian tunnels to a wide, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins as the character enters a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, moving past concrete pillars under a green fluorescent glow. As the character exits into the open night air, the scene expands to reveal towering skyscrapers and palm trees before the camera glides under a massive overpass illuminated by a striking blue neon strip. The environment then opens up further as the character emerges from the underpass into a bustling intersection dominated by a hotel with blue Japanese signage, where they navigate rain-slicked crosswalks and passing futuristic vehicles. Finally, the camera follows the character along a commercial sidewalk, passing the bright blue glow of a 24/7 convenience store and holographic advertisements as the hotel recedes into the distance.
